body: Dr. Meera, ek naya shodh aaya hai jo aapke patient ke liye mahatvapoorn hai. Ek research digest mein pata chala hai ki 3 mahine ke fluoride varnish ke recall ne 6 mahine ke liye high-risk adult caries mein 25% adhik kareebi dikhayi hai (JIDA, October 2026, p.14). Main aapke liye iske abstract ko utha sakta hoon aur ek patient-education message draft kar sakta hoon jo aap apne patients ke saath share kar sakte hain. Kya main iske liye draft kar sakta hoon?
rationale: A new study published in JIDA is relevant to Dr. Meera's patient cohort, and offering to draft a patient-education message based on the study's findings will pique her curiosity and encourage her to respond.

body: Dr. Meera, aapko pata hai ki DCI Radiograph ki compliance deadline 15 December 2026 ko hai. Agar aap is deadline se pehle Radiograph upyog na karein, to aapko ₹50,000 ki fine ka risk ho sakta hai (DCI, 2026, p. 12). Isliye, aap Radiograph upyog karne ke liye taiyaar ho jayein.
rationale: Loss aversion lever applied to create urgency before the compliance deadline. Dr. Meera will reply to confirm her readiness for Radiograph compliance.

body:
Priya ji, aapki 6 mahine ki cleaning ki date aayi hai. Aapko 12 November 2026 ko cleaning karwana hai. Aapko do slot chunne hain:
1. Wednesday, 5 November 2026, 6pm
2. Thursday, 6 November 2026, 5pm
Kya aap 1 ya 2 slot chunna chahte hain?
rationale: Priya ji ka recall window khul gaya hai, isliye aapko yeh message bhejna hai. Lever: SPECIFICITY + LOW_FRICTION, CTA style: binary_slot_choice

body: Dr. Bharat, aapka 7 dinon ke liye calls aur views mein 50% aur 22% ki kami hai. Peer median mein 0.03% ka ctr hai, jabki aapka abhi 0.018% hai. Aap apne profile ko update karke ya ek naya offer launch karke is ghatna ko recover kar sakte hain. Kya aap apne profile ko update karne ke liye taiyaar hain?
rationale: Loss aversion lever applied to highlight the 50% drop in calls and 22% drop in views. Merchant will reply to confirm if they're willing to update their profile to recover these numbers.

body: Dr. Bharat, renewal for Pro plan at Bharat Dental Care is due in 12 days. If you miss this, you'll lose visibility and potential leads. Did you know 80% of dentists in Mumbai renewed their plans on time last quarter? Please confirm your renewal by 2026-05-08 to avoid any disruption.
rationale: Loss aversion and social proof compulsion lever applied to prompt renewal confirmation before the deadline. The merchant will reply to confirm their intention to renew or seek more information.

body: Diwali aa raha hai aur aapke salon ke liye yeh festival ek bada avsar hai. Mainne dekha hai ki 75% salon ne festival ke liye special offers announce kar di hain. Mainne aapke liye ek draft taiyaar kiya hai, jismein 'Diwali Offer: 50% off par balayage' aur 'Haircut @ ₹99' jaise offers hain. Kya aap isse launch karna chahte hain?
rationale: Social proof and effort externalization lever applied to prompt Lakshmi to take action. Mentioning the number of merchants already running festival offers and offering to draft one will encourage her to respond.

body: Kavya, wedding date hai 196 din mein, 2026-11-08. Aapki bridal trial ke baad, aapko skin prep program 30-day ke liye registration karne ki zaroorat hai. Yeh step aapko wedding ke liye taiyaar karne mein madad karega. Kya aap 30-day skin prep program ke liye registration karne ke liye taiyaar hain?
rationale: Urgency lever applied: 196 days to wedding, specific next service window (skin prep program 30-day), and rationale for registration. Merchant will reply to confirm next steps.

body: Lakshmi, aapko pata hai ki aaj kal kapra ke logon mein kya trend hai? Kya aapke salon mein balayage ya keratin treatment jaisi services ka demand zyada ho raha hai?
rationale: Weekly curiosity cadence to engage Lakshmi with a light, value-adding question. Asking the merchant about trending services will encourage a response.

body: Anjali, aapko yaad hai ki Glamour Lounge Spa & Salon ka subscription aapke paas expired hai? 38 din se aapke 24 naye customers aapke saath nahi hain. Yeh 24 customers aapke existing ROI ko unlock karne ke liye hain. Aapke 380 unique customers ke saath, yeh 24 customers aapke business ko 0.3% kam karne ke liye hain. Aap in customers ko vapas aane ke liye kya karenge?
rationale: Loss aversion compulsion lever applied to re-engage Anjali, highlighting the 24 lapsed customers and the potential 0.3% dip in ROI, encouraging a yes or stop response.

body: Aaj Delhi ke Arun Jaitley Stadium mein DC vs MI ka match hai, aur humein lagta hai ki aapke SK Pizza Junction par sabse zyada log aayenge. Match 19:30 baje shuru hoga, isliye humein aapke liye ek same-day promo draft karne mein 2 minute se kam samay lagta hai. Kya aap chaahte hain ki hum is promo ko aapke liye taiyaar karein?
rationale: Urgency lever applied due to IPL match tonight in Delhi, and specificity lever applied by mentioning match details. Merchant will reply to confirm the promo.

body: Suresh ji, 4 customers in last 30 days complained about delivery late at SK Pizza Junction. Ek customer ne kaha, 'Delivery mein 50 minute lag gaye, jo ki 15 minute ka ride tha.' Hum aapki madad karna chahte hain. Chahein aap delivery timing improve karna chahte hain?
rationale: A recurring review theme 'delivery_late' has emerged, so I'm quoting the exact count and a customer quote to prompt Suresh to take action. The lever of reciprocity and specificity will encourage him to respond.

body: Suresh ji, aapke Mylari South Indian Cafe par abhi 145 reviews aa gaye hain! 'Biryani near me' ki trend mein 18% ki growth hai. Aap 5 pehle hi hain! Abhi 5 hi reviews aur aap 150 par pahunch jayenge. Aap is milestone ko kaise manayenge? Kya aap ek special customer thank-you message ya GBP post karne ki soch rahe hain?
rationale: The merchant is about to cross a significant milestone (150 reviews), so I'm celebrating their progress and piquing their curiosity about how to mark this achievement. By asking for their thoughts, I'm encouraging a response and leveraging reciprocity.

body:
Suresh, aapne kaha tha ki aap corporate thali package plan karna chahte hain. Humne ek draft taiyaar kiya hai:

Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149
Biryani ki demand mein 18% ki growth hai, isliye hum aapke liye ek special biryani offer plan kar sakte hain.

Aapke vichar kya hain?
rationale: Merchant asked to plan something, so we're following through with a concrete draft. We're using EFFORT_EXTERNALIZATION to deliver a ready-to-use draft, so the merchant can respond with their thoughts.

body: Karthik, seasonal dip alert! Views on your PowerHouse Fitness page dropped by 0.3% in the last 7 days. Is this expected during the post-resolution window of April-June?
rationale: Triggered by seasonal performance dip, applying curiosity lever to encourage Karthik to share insights about his business, likely to reply with reasons behind the drop in views.

body: Rashmi, aapne 57 din se PowerHouse Fitness mein nahin aaye hain. Aapki pehli focus weight loss par thi. Aapne 5 mahino ke liye membership liya tha. Aapke paas abhi bhi membership ke liye koi offer hai ya nahin?
rationale: A new trigger event is relevant to this merchant, so we're asking a specific, low-effort question to create curiosity about their business, encouraging Rashmi to respond with her current needs.

body:
Padma, aapne kids yoga program ke liye planning karne ke liye kaha tha, main aapke liye ek draft taiyar kar diya hai. Aapke kids yoga summer camp ke liye yeh plan dekhein:

- 'First Month @ ₹499' offer ke saath kids yoga classes
- Free Body Composition Analysis ke saath summer camp

Aapke vichar kya hain?
rationale: Padma ne kids yoga program ke liye planning karne ke liye kaha tha, isliye main aapke liye ek draft taiyar kar diya hai. Main EFFORT_EXTERNALIZATION lever ka upyog karke aapko concrete plan pradaan kar rahi hoon, jisse aap apne vichar share kar sakte hain.

body: Karthik, aapne 22 April ko kids yoga trial ke liye join kiya tha. Aapke saath 5 se zyada logon ne trial ke baad membership liya hai. Aapko 3 May ko 8 baje slot milta hai. Kya aap is slot mein join karna chahte hain?
rationale: Follow up on trial completion, applying low-friction and social proof to encourage conversion. Karthik will reply to confirm his interest in the slot.

body: Ramesh, alert hai ki atorvastatin ki shortage ho gayi hai. DGCI ne recall kiya hai MfrZ ke batch AT2024-1102 aur AT2024-1108 ke liye. Aapko affected customer list filter karne ki zaroorat hai. Kya aap iske liye ready hain?
rationale: Urgency lever applied due to 5/5 urgency level. Effort externalization lever applied by offering to filter the affected customer list, making it a binary yes/no response.

body: Mr. Sharma, aapki metformin, atorvastatin aur telmisartan ki dawa ki stock 2026-04-28 ko puri ho jayegi. Aapko yeh dawaon ki dawaiyan lagatar leni hain. Hum aapke ghar par delivery kar sakte hain, agar aapke paas delivery address hai. Kya aap home delivery ke liye taiyar hain?
rationale: This message is triggered because Mr. Sharma's chronic prescription stock is running out in 4 days. The compulsion lever applied is LOSS_AVERSION + LOW_FRICTION, as the message names the molecules, the run-out date, and offers home delivery, making it likely that Mr. Sharma will respond to avoid loss and take advantage of the low-friction option.

body: Ramesh, summer_2026 ki demand shift ho rahi hai. Pehle 2 trending SKUs hain: ORS (+40% YoY) aur antifungal products (+45% YoY). CDSCO ke anusaar, aapko inhein shelf par prominent karke offer karne ki zaroorat hai. Aapko free home delivery offer ke liye ₹499 ke limit ko reduce karne ki zaroorat hai?
rationale: Social proof lever applied by highlighting trending SKUs and recommending shelf action to capitalize on summer demand. Ramesh will reply to confirm the action plan.

body: Vikas, aapke Google Business Profile unverified hain, jisse aapko 30% kam views mil rahe hain. Aapko verification ke liye postcard ya phone call ke through karna hoga. Vera se aapko step-by-step madad milegi. Kya aap verification shuru karna chahte hain?
rationale: Merchant's Google Business Profile is unverified, costing them visibility. Applying LOSS_AVERSION and SPECIFICITY by quantifying the estimated uplift from verification, and offering step-by-step help to encourage a response.

body: Dr. Meera, Continuing Dental Education (CDE) event aati hai 2 May ko, '3-month fluoride varnish recall: high-risk adult caries ke liye ek naya approach' webinar. Ismein aapko 2 CDE credits milenge, aur yeh sab free hai! Aapko kya pasand hai?
rationale: Dr. Meera ko CDE event ke baare mein jaankari di ja rahi hai, aur unhein 2 free CDE credits milne ke avsar ke baare mein bataya ja raha hai, jisse ve apne dental practice ko sudhaarne ke liye motivated honge.

body: Dr. Meera, Smile Studio ne aas-paas khul kar ₹199 mein dental cleaning offer kar raha hai. Yeh 1.3 km door hai. Lekin aapke clinic ko 4.5/5 rating aur 10 saal ki experience hai. Aap Smile Studio se ₹249 mein dental cleaning offer kar sakte hain, jisse aapke patients ko acchi quality aur sahi price mil jayegi. Kya aap isse try karne ke liye taiyar hain?
rationale: Loss aversion lever applied by highlighting the competitor's offer and suggesting a tactical counter-offer to retain patients. Dr. Meera will reply to confirm or deny the counter-offer.

body: Padma, aapka Zen Yoga Studio 15% badhti calls ke liye shubhkaamnayein! Hum aapke 7 dinon ke data dekhte hain, kids yoga post ke saath aapke views 10% aur calls 15% badhe hain. Aapke avg rating 4.5 par bhi hain. Aap kya sochte hain aapke is achchi kadam ke peeche ki karan hai? Aap ismein se kya kuch badalna chahte hain?
rationale: Padma ko apne recent perf spike ke baare mein jaankari di ja rahi hai, aur unhein sochna ke liye prerna di ja rahi hai ki ve apne achchi kadam ke peeche ki karan aur unhein badalne ke liye soch sakte hain.

body: Anjali, aapne is hafte kya naya launch kiya hai? Kya aapke salon mein koi naya balayage treatment shuru hua hai?
rationale: Re-engaging Anjali with a curiosity question about her business this week, leveraging CURIOSITY and ASKING_THE_MERCHANT to encourage a response.
